interfaces.name: PhotoAsset
interfaces.signature: protocol PhotoAsset { var identifier: String { get }; var creationDate: Date? { get }; var location: GeoCoordinate? { get }; var mediaSubtype: PhotoMediaSubtype { get }; var pixelSize: CGSize { get }; var qualityScore: Double { get } }
interfaces.notes: Lives in AfterglowCore package (Foundation-only, no Photos/CoreLocation import). Real conformance is PhotosLibraryAdapter's PHAssetWrapper; test conformance is FixturePhotoAsset.

interfaces.name: GeoCoordinate
interfaces.signature: struct GeoCoordinate: Equatable { let latitude: Double; let longitude: Double }
interfaces.notes: Framework-free stand-in for CLLocationCoordinate2D so AfterglowCore has zero platform-framework deps.

interfaces.name: PhotoMediaSubtype
interfaces.signature: enum PhotoMediaSubtype { case camera, screenshot, video, livePhoto, other }
interfaces.notes: Drives default screenshot/non-camera exclusion from clusters.

interfaces.name: DayClusterResult
interfaces.signature: struct DayClusterResult: Equatable { let date: Date; let assetIdentifiers: [String]; let suggestedCoverIdentifier: String? }
interfaces.notes: Output of ClusteringEngine.cluster; UI/services lanes map this onto TripDay/PhotoRef rows.

interfaces.name: ClusteringEngine.cluster
interfaces.signature: static func cluster(assets: [PhotoAsset], calendar: Calendar) -> [DayClusterResult]
interfaces.notes: Pure, synchronous, nonisolated. Timestamp-only; location is enrichment applied inside, never a hard dependency. Call off-MainActor for libraries >~500 assets.

interfaces.name: BurstCollapser.collapse
interfaces.signature: static func collapse(assets: [PhotoAsset], within interval: TimeInterval) -> [[PhotoAsset]]
interfaces.notes: Groups near-duplicate burst shots so cover selection and day strips aren't destabilized by bursts.

interfaces.name: CoverPhotoHeuristic.selectCover
interfaces.signature: static func selectCover(from assets: [PhotoAsset]) -> PhotoAsset?
interfaces.notes: Pure function over precomputed qualityScore; does NOT decode pixels itself — PhotosLibraryAdapter precomputes qualityScore at ingestion.

interfaces.name: TripStatus
interfaces.signature: enum TripStatus: String, Codable { case draft, exported }
interfaces.notes: Persisted on Trip; drives Trips Home card treatment.

interfaces.name: Trip
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Trip { var id: UUID; var title: String; var startDate: Date; var endDate: Date; var status: TripStatus; var themeID: String; var coverPhotoAssetID: String?; var createdAt: Date; var exportedAt: Date?; var lastExportedPDFPath: String?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var days: [TripDay] }
interfaces.notes: SwiftData @Model, part of AfterglowSchemaV1.

interfaces.name: TripDay
interfaces.signature: @Model final class TripDay { var id: UUID; var date: Date; var orderIndex: Int; var captionText: String; var captionUpdatedAt: Date; @Relationship(inverse: \Trip.days) var trip: Trip?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var photoRefs: [PhotoRef]; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var voiceNote: VoiceNote? }
interfaces.notes: SwiftData @Model.

interfaces.name: PhotoRef
interfaces.signature: @Model final class PhotoRef { var id: UUID; var assetLocalIdentifier: String; var orderIndex: Int; var isManuallyAdded: Bool; var isMissing: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Never stores image bytes, only PHAsset.localIdentifier. isMissing persisted so UI can render MissingAssetTile even before re-resolution.

interfaces.name: VoiceNote
interfaces.signature: @Model final class VoiceNote { var id: UUID; var fileURL: URL; var duration: TimeInterval; var transcript: String?; var transcriptEdited: Bool; var recordedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: SwiftData @Model; fileURL relative to Application Support.

interfaces.name: AfterglowSchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum AfterglowSchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { [Trip.self, TripDay.self, PhotoRef.self, VoiceNote.self] } }
interfaces.notes: Paired with AfterglowMigrationPlan: SchemaMigrationPlan (currently single-stage) set up from commit one per ios_architecture_review.

interfaces.name: JournalExportSidecar
interfaces.signature: struct JournalExportSidecar: Codable { let tripID: UUID; let title: String; let days: [SidecarDay]; let themeID: String; let exportedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Serialized alongside the PDF at export; cloud-sync-ready per per_app_product_brief, and shareable standalone as a lightweight user-triggered backup path (export-only, no import UI — named limitation).

interfaces.name: PermissionProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol PermissionProviding { func photosAuthorizationStatus() -> PhotosAuthState; func requestPhotosAccess() async -> PhotosAuthState; func microphoneAuthorizationStatus() -> AVAudioSession.RecordPermission; func requestMicrophoneAccess() async -> Bool; func speechAuthorizationStatus() -> SFSpeechRecognizerAuthorizationStatus; func requestSpeechAccess() async -> SFSpeechRecognizerAuthorizationStatus }
interfaces.notes: Real implementation wraps PHPhotoLibrary/AVAudioSession/SFSpeechRecognizer; fake implementation used by app-level and UI tests to force denied/limited/revoked-mid-session deterministically.

interfaces.name: PhotosAuthState
interfaces.signature: enum PhotosAuthState { case notDetermined, full, limited, denied }
interfaces.notes: Drives the three-state Photos permission machine plus the revoked-mid-session transition.

interfaces.name: PhotosLibraryAdapter
interfaces.signature: struct PhotosLibraryAdapter { func fetchAssets(in range: DateInterval) async -> [PhotoAsset]; func resolveAsset(identifier: String) async -> PhotoAsset? }
interfaces.notes: Only place PHAsset/PHPhotoLibrary is imported outside permission code. Precomputes qualityScore per asset here.

interfaces.name: TripFlowStep
interfaces.signature: enum TripFlowStep: Hashable { case tripSetup(tripID: UUID); case clusterReview(tripID: UUID); case captionEditor(tripID: UUID); case themePreview(tripID: UUID); case exportPreview(tripID: UUID) }
interfaces.notes: Pushed onto a single NavigationPath rooted at Trips Home.

interfaces.name: TripStore
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class TripStore { func createTrip(range: DateInterval) async -> UUID; func reassignPhoto(_ photoRefID: UUID, to dayID: UUID); func updateCaption(for dayID: UUID, text: String); func chooseTheme(_ themeID: String, for tripID: UUID); func beginExport(for tripID: UUID) -> AsyncStream<ExportProgress>; func markExported(tripID: UUID, pdfURL: URL); func resumeStep(for tripID: UUID) -> TripFlowStep }
interfaces.notes: Sole mutation entry point — views and services never touch ModelContext directly. resumeStep backs both app-resume and widget deep-link routing.

interfaces.name: AudioRecordingService
interfaces.signature: final class AudioRecordingService { func startRecording() throws; func stopRecording() -> URL?; func handleInterruption(_ notification: Notification) }
interfaces.notes: Owns AVAudioSession/AVAudioRecorder; interruption handler auto-saves partial recording rather than discarding.

interfaces.name: TranscriptionService
interfaces.signature: struct TranscriptionService { func transcribe(fileURL: URL) async throws -> String }
interfaces.notes: Wraps SFSpeechRecognizer; only invoked after speech-recognition authorization is separately granted from microphone.

interfaces.name: ExportProgress
interfaces.signature: enum ExportProgress { case rendering(page: Int, of: Int); case completed(fileURL: URL); case failed(AfterglowError) }
interfaces.notes: Streamed from the PDFExportRenderer actor to the Export Preview view for a determinate progress bar.

interfaces.name: PDFExportRenderer
interfaces.signature: actor PDFExportRenderer { func render(trip: Trip, theme: ThemeID) -> AsyncStream<ExportProgress> }
interfaces.notes: Runs off the main actor; downsamples export images to a defined ceiling (e.g. 2400px long edge) distinct from review-grid thumbnails. Consumes ExportLayoutEngine.layout output.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: @Observable @MainActor final class EntitlementStore { var isSubscribed: Bool; func refresh() async; func purchase(_ product: Product) async throws; func restorePurchases() async }
interfaces.notes: Backed by StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements + Transaction.updates; existing trips remain accessible regardless of lapsed status, only new-trip creation gates on isSubscribed.

interfaces.name: WidgetSnapshotWriter
interfaces.signature: struct WidgetSnapshotWriter { func writeSnapshot(tripID: UUID, title: String, coverImage: UIImage) throws }
interfaces.notes: Writes downsampled cover + JSON snapshot to App Group container and calls WidgetCenter.shared.reloadTimelines synchronously inside TripStore.markExported, before the trip flips to exported.

interfaces.name: afterglow://trip/<id>
interfaces.signature: afterglow://trip/{tripID}
interfaces.notes: Widget deep link; resolved via TripStore.resumeStep(for:) to push the correct TripFlowStep or a read-only export view.

interfaces.name: AfterglowError
interfaces.signature: enum AfterglowError: Error { case assetUnavailable, permissionDenied(PermissionKind), exportRenderFailed(underlying: Error), shareCancelled, diskFull }
interfaces.notes: Unified error surface consumed by all screen-level error states; shareCancelled must never mutate Trip.status.

interfaces.name: MissingAssetTile.resolve
interfaces.signature: static func resolve(photoRef: PhotoRef, adapter: PhotosLibraryAdapter) async -> AssetResolutionResult
interfaces.notes: AssetResolutionResult is .available(PhotoAsset) or .missing; used by Cluster Review, Caption Editor, Export Preview so a library-deleted photo renders a defined tile, not a crash.

interfaces.name: AssetResolutionResult
interfaces.signature: enum AssetResolutionResult { case available(PhotoAsset); case missing }
interfaces.notes: Shared result type for the missing-asset-tile pattern across three screens.

interfaces.name: ExportLayoutEngine.layout
interfaces.signature: static func layout(trip: JournalExportSidecar, theme: ThemeID) -> [ExportPageLayout]
interfaces.notes: Pure page-composition math (photo placement, caption flow) consumed by PDFExportRenderer; kept in AfterglowCore so layout logic is unit-testable without PDFKit.

interfaces.name: ExportPageLayout
interfaces.signature: struct ExportPageLayout: Equatable { let dayIndex: Int; let photoIdentifiers: [String]; let captionText: String }
interfaces.notes: Intermediate output between ExportLayoutEngine and PDFExportRenderer's actual drawing code.

interfaces.name: ThemeID
interfaces.signature: enum ThemeID: String, Codable { case classicPaperV1 }
interfaces.notes: Single v1 theme; future themes add cases, no picker UI required to add them.

interfaces.name: SidecarDay
interfaces.signature: struct SidecarDay: Codable { let date: Date; let captionText: String; let photoIdentifiers: [String]; let voiceTranscript: String? }
interfaces.notes: Element type of JournalExportSidecar.days.

interfaces.name: PermissionKind
interfaces.signature: enum PermissionKind { case photos, microphone, speechRecognition }
interfaces.notes: Used by AfterglowError.permissionDenied so error UI can show the correct denied-state copy and Settings deep link per permission.
